languages.text: "Молодец, Куравич. Не гнушайся любых средств стать сильнее".

traits.locale_text: "Молодец, Куравич. Не гнушайся любых средств стать сильнее".

languages.text: "Good idea, Kuravich. Do not shy away from any means to grow stronger."
languages.original_text: "Молодец, Куравич. Не гнушайся любых средств стать сильнее".

traits.locale_text: "Well done, Kuravich. Do not shy away from any means to grow stronger."
"Well done, Kuravich. Do not shy away from any means to grow stronger."
"Good idea, Kuravich. Do not shy away from any means to grow stronger."
"Good idea, Kuravich. Do not shy away from any means to grow stronger."

languages.text: “这主意不错，库拉维奇。为了变强，不要避讳任何手段。”
languages.original_text: "Good idea, Kuravich. Do not shy away from any means to grow stronger."

traits.locale_text: “这主意不错，库拉维奇。为了变强，不要避讳任何手段。”

languages.text: "Aferin Kuravich. Güçlenmek için ne gerekiyorsa yap."
languages.original_text: "Good idea, Kuravich. Do not shy away from any means to grow stronger."

traits.locale_text: "Aferin Kuravich. Güçlenmek için ne gerekiyorsa yap."

languages.text: « Bonne idée, Kuravich. N'hésitez pas à employer tout ce qui peut vous faire gagner en force. »
languages.original_text: "Good idea, Kuravich. Do not shy away from any means to grow stronger."

traits.locale_text: « Bonne idée, Kuravich. N'hésitez pas à employer tout ce qui peut vous faire gagner en force. »

languages.text: «Buena idea, Kuravich. No rechace ningún camino hacia el poder».
languages.original_text: "Good idea, Kuravich. Do not shy away from any means to grow stronger."

traits.locale_text: «Buena idea, Kuravich. No rechace ningún camino hacia el poder».

languages.text: "Gute Idee, Kuravich. Schreckt vor nichts zurück, um stärker zu werden."
languages.original_text: "Good idea, Kuravich. Do not shy away from any means to grow stronger."

traits.locale_text: "Gute Idee, Kuravich. Schreckt vor nichts zurück, um stärker zu werden."

languages.text: 「いい考えだ、クラビッチ。強くなるために手段を選ばないことだ。」
languages.original_text: "Good idea, Kuravich. Do not shy away from any means to grow stronger."

traits.locale_text: 「いい考えだ、クラビッチ。強くなるために手段を選ばないことだ。」
